## Summary

Describe the change and the workflow it supports.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include real API tokens.
- [ ] I did not include private data.
- [ ] I did not add fake API endpoints.
- [ ] I did not document `/api/v1` as live.
- [ ] I did not add fake MCP packages or tools.
- [ ] I did not add forced backlink language.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`, or I explain why not below.

## Use-Case Checklist

- [ ] This is a real use case or it is clearly marked sample/example.
- [ ] I have permission to share any links, screenshots, and code.
- [ ] External links are optional, relevant to the developer workflow, and not included for link manipulation.

## Validation Notes

Add command output or explain skipped checks.
